emails.subject: DRAFT Outline and PP Slides--Briefing Package
emails.subject_base: DRAFT Outline and PP Slides--Briefing Package
emails.body: DRAFT Outline and PP Slides--Briefing Package I've focused my attention on editing the outline, which is about 60-75% complete. Haven't touched the slides---they'll require substantially more work; but we shouldn't have any problem putting it to bed by end of next week. Have a good weekend. Best, Jeff
